Label: Section 1.1
Issue: The goals and objectives section does not specify measurable goals.
Suggestion: Specify measurable goals such as 'reduce administrative time by 30%' or 'increase parent satisfaction by 20%'.

Label: Section 1.2
Issue: The statement of scope does not mention any design constraints or external interfaces.
Suggestion: Include design constraints such as 'must comply with HIPAA regulations' and external interfaces like 'integration with existing payroll systems'.

Label: R7
Issue: Does not specify the method for resetting the password after a user is locked out.
Suggestion: Include a requirement that specifies the method for resetting the password, such as 'The system shall allow administrators to reset user passwords through a secure interface.'

Label: R12
Issue: Does not specify how a new password is assigned if a user forgets their password.
Suggestion: Specify the process for assigning a new password, such as 'The system shall send a temporary password to the user's registered email address.'

Label: R13
Issue: Does not specify what happens to unsaved data when a user is logged off due to inactivity.
Suggestion: Include a requirement that specifies the handling of unsaved data, such as 'The system shall prompt the user to save their work before logging off due to inactivity.'

Label: R17
Issue: Does not specify the format or appearance of the popup window displaying the reminder message.
Suggestion: Include a requirement that specifies the format and appearance of the popup window, such as 'The popup window shall display the reminder message in a bold font with a blue background.'

Label: R19
Issue: Does not specify what happens if the immunization reminder is ignored.
Suggestion: If the immunization reminder is ignored, the system shall send an alert to the administrator.

Label: R22
Issue: Does not specify the format of the notification for required immunizations on the monthly invoice.
Suggestion: Include a requirement that specifies the format of the notification, such as 'The notification shall be displayed in red text at the top of the invoice.'

Label: R26
Issue: Does not specify the format or content of the account history.

Label: R28
Issue: Does not specify how late pick-up fees are calculated and added to the invoice.
Suggestion: Include a requirement that specifies the calculation method for late pick-up fees, such as 'Late pick-up fees shall be calculated based on the number of minutes past the scheduled pick-up time and added to the invoice automatically.'

Label: R39
Issue: Does not specify how the user ID, date, time, and description of changes are recorded in the database.
Suggestion: Include a requirement that specifies the method for recording changes, such as 'The system shall log the user ID, date, time, and description of changes in a secure audit trail.'

Label: R44
Issue: Does not specify what happens if the maximum number of children in a classroom is exceeded.
Suggestion: Include a requirement that specifies the handling of over-enrollment, such as 'The system shall prevent the addition of more than 20 children to a classroom and notify the administrator.'

Label: R50
